subject:
Re: Tomogram CTF estimation / Reconstruction of CTF corrected
 tomograms
body:
Hi Dmitry,

The having crashed previously is definitely a possibility, my first tests were just hitting buttons to try things without really knowing what was happening. The tip about the tomostar and xml files is useful, thank you.

I did the control about half an hour ago with EMD-10164 (HIV) and unfortunately that works fine under the same workflow - I’ll dig a little deeper and send you a tilt-series tomorrow!

Cheers,

Alister
